# DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS ONLY - NOT ACTUAL ETH
# =========================================
# WARNING: These are development accounts generated by Ganache for local testing only.
# The ETH in these accounts is not real and has no value on mainnet or testnets.
# DO NOT use these private keys for actual cryptocurrency transactions.
# NEVER share private keys of accounts containing real funds.

# How to Import Account to MetaMask
# ==================================
# 1. Open MetaMask browser extension
# 2. Click on the account icon in the top-right
# 3. Select "Import Account"
# 4. Copy and paste a private key from above
# 5. Click "Import"

# How to Set Up Custom Network (Ganache)
# ======================================
# 1. Open MetaMask browser extension
# 2. Click on the network dropdown at the top
# 3. Click "Add Network" > "Add a network manually"
# 4. Fill in the following details:
#    - Network Name: Content Authentication Local
#    - New RPC URL: http://127.0.0.1:7545
#    - Chain ID: 1337
#    - Currency Symbol: ETH
#    - Block Explorer URL: (leave blank)
# 5. Click "Save"

# Usage Notes
# ===========
# - After importing an account, connect to the local Ganache network
# - These accounts will now have 1000 ETH (test ETH only)
# - Use these accounts to interact with the Content Authentication dApp
# - Any transactions will be recorded on your local blockchain only
